meta.title: Dialogues on American Foreign Policy and World Affairs: A Conversation with Senator Marco Rubio
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Senator Marco Rubio on U.S. relations with China, Latin America and Iran. The event will also address the trajectory of U.S. foreign policy more broadly and the future of the Republican party in light of changes in the shape of the Republican coalition. Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Walter Russell Mead will moderate the conversation.
